item.title: The 'Tea App' Hack Takes an Insane Turn
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
0:00 Intro 0:45 Original Tea App Hack 4:09 Tea Clone App Hack 6:07 Hacking ATMs with Raspberry Pis
Sources: https://techcrunch.com/2025/08/06/a-rival-tea-app-for-men-is-leaking-its-users-personal-data-and-drivers-licenses/ https://www.404media.co/a-second-tea-breach-reveals-users-dms-about-abortions-and-cheating/ https://www.404media.co/women-dating-safety-app-tea-breached-users-ids-posted-to-4chan/
